name: Enchanted Garden
signature: A living branch arch frames the cover like an enchanted garden gate, blinking fireflies and drifting magic mist fill the whole page, a glowing vine flourish blooms as the divider between every section, couple photos sit inside a six-leaf glowing medallion, fairy-dust sparkles twinkle around the opening quote, and a maximized three-layer field of floating + parallaxed fireflies and leaves covers all 14 sections.
brief: Built entirely from scratch, by explicit request, with no relation to the prior 'Padi Sunda' brief — a fairy-tale woodland romance in deep emerald and warm firefly gold, dreamy rather than ceremonial. Includes the full standard section set (Susunan Acara with icons, Dress Code, Hashtag & Instagram, quick-nav, auto-scroll, per-section background photos, admin-controlled and independently togglable).
